title: Tcard_KB8-H624BNPQ-Q-200317V757
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: KB8-H624BNPQ-Q-200317V757

Key Features
Release a stable version of HiOS 6.0 based on Android 10.
Add system-wide Dark Theme to make it easier on your eyes and your phone battery too.
Add Social Turbo to get the most out of WhatsApp. (Go to Settings > Social Turbo)
Add Game mode to meet the needs of broader users. (Go to Settings > Game mode)
Add Ficool, an Africa's largest online reading app with books in bulk to catch your eyes.

1.System
Enable system-wide Dark Theme.
Add support for TLS 1.3 to improve performance, privacy and security.

2. Social Turbo
Customize Social Turbo for WhatsApp with features of video beautification, exclusive sticker packs, reading messages recalled by the sender, hiding message read receipts, etc. Be free to start chatting in a novel way.

3. Game mode
Add features like Do Not Disturb from notifications, Barrage notifications, Off-screen gaming, Parental control, etc., showing you how immersive gaming works.

4.Home screen, Wallpaper
Add access to instant apps, and reminders of recently uninstalled apps and the residuals cleanup on the Home screen.
Remove Magazine lock screen

5. Calling
Optimize call quality, add video shows for incoming calls as well as the gesture to answer them easily.
Swipe to delete a single call log.
Remove Intelligent Voice Broadcast.

6. Settings, Security and Privacy
Share Wi-Fi via QR codes.
Monitor auto-start apps to prevent them from starting in the background and from further pushing disturbing notifications.
Optimize gestures navigation that enables returning to the previous level through swiping inward from the edges of the screen. Remove the two-button navigation option.
Optimize Location permissions control, limiting Location access to apps in use, for the sake of privacy.
Restrict apps' access to the device's non-resettable identifiers for the sake of privacy.

7. Others
Count steps via the three-party apps. Customize the silent notifications feature. Replace Downloads with Google Files.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit the TECNO spot forum (http://bbs.tecno-mobile.com) for more information.
